title: RapidMeta Haematology | Venetoclax-Based Fixed-Duration Therapy in CLL v1.0
hero_h2: Venetoclax-Based Fixed-Duration Combination Therapy in Chronic Lymphocytic Leukaemia

pico.pop: Adults with chronic lymphocytic leukaemia / small lymphocytic lymphoma: previously-untreated with comorbidities (CLL14), relapsed/refractory after >=1 prior therapy (MURANO), or fit treatment-naive (CLL13/GAIA)
pico.int: Venetoclax-based fixed-duration combination: venetoclax + obinutuzumab (Ven+G; CLL14, 12-month duration), venetoclax + rituximab (Ven+R; MURANO, 24-month duration), or venetoclax + obinutuzumab +/- ibrutinib in fit patients (CLL13/GAIA, 12-15 month duration)
pico.comp: Standard chemo-immunotherapy: chlorambucil + obinutuzumab (CLL14), bendamustine + rituximab (MURANO and CLL13/GAIA chemo-immunotherapy arm), or fludarabine + cyclophosphamide + rituximab (CLL13/GAIA fit-FCR arm)
pico.out: Progression-free survival (PFS; primary in all three trials, time from randomization to documented disease progression or death; HR vs control)
pico.subgroup: Fitness (CIRS, creatinine clearance), TP53 status (mutation / del17p), IGHV mutation status, age, prior lines of therapy

real_data_entries.name: CLL14
real_data_entries.group: Venetoclax + obinutuzumab (12 months) vs chlorambucil + obinutuzumab in previously-untreated CLL with comorbidities; primary endpoint PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Fischer K et al. NEJM 2019;380:2225-2236 (CLL14 venetoclax + obinutuzumab 1L).

real_data_entries.name: MURANO
real_data_entries.group: Venetoclax + rituximab (24 months) vs bendamustine + rituximab in relapsed/refractory CLL; primary endpoint PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Seymour JF et al. NEJM 2018;378:1107-1120 (MURANO venetoclax + rituximab R/R CLL).

real_data_entries.name: CLL13/GAIA
real_data_entries.group: Venetoclax + obinutuzumab (12 months) vs standard chemoimmunotherapy (FCR / BR by age) in previously-untreated fit CLL without TP53 aberrations; primary endpoint PFS (Ven+G vs CIT arm)

allOutcomes.title: Progression-free survival (primary; HR Ven+G vs CIT)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Eichhorst B et al. NEJM 2023;388:1739-1754 (CLL13/GAIA venetoclax-based 1L fit CLL).
